items.title: The ECB is convening banks to fix the cybersecurity flaws that AI models like Mythos keep finding
items.summary: The European Central Bank is calling banks in for a meeting on Tuesday to address the cybersecurity risks created by a new generation of AI models that can find and exploit software vulnerabilities faster than any human team. items.title: SoftBank hits a fresh record as Tokyo bets the OpenAI IPO is finally coming

items.title: Što će ti dopunsko? I zašto ga je najskuplje nemati?
